name: layout/auth-layout
description: Centered card layout for authentication pages (login, register, forgot password).

meta.name: AuthLayout
meta.description: Centered card layout for authentication pages (login, register, forgot password).

props.name: logo
props.description: Optional logo displayed above the form

whenToUse: Centered card layout for authentication pages — login, register, reset
Focused single-task pages with an optional logo and minimal chrome
whenNotToUse: A full app frame after sign-in — use AppShell or SidebarApp

related.name: LoginPage
related.reason: The login page block renders inside this layout

related.name: Center
related.reason: Use for plain centering without the auth card framing

intent.a11yRationale: Provides a main landmark wrapping the focused auth content.
